message:
refactor(commands): replace ForkCandidate with diagnostic formatting and reload diagnostics

Remove ForkCandidate struct and fork_candidates() from commands.rs — these
were moved to tree.rs as part of the interactive module extraction.

Replace with new command infrastructure:
- kind_rank(): Deterministic ordering for DiagnosticKind (Warning < Collision)
- format_resource_diagnostics(): Formats ResourceDiagnostic slices into
  structured output with path, kind label, and collision winner/loser detail
- build_reload_diagnostics(): Aggregates diagnostics from models.json errors,
  skill/prompt/tool resource loaders into a unified (Option<String>, count)
  return for the /reload command's status display

These functions support the /reload slash command's ability to surface
configuration problems (model parse errors, skill collisions, prompt
conflicts) in a sorted, deduplicated format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
